content.full_text:
October 29, 1991

Fair Political Practices Commission
Attention John Wallace
428 J. St., Suite 800
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA 95804-0807

RE: Request for Opinion

Ladies and Gentlemen:

This is to confirm my conversation with John Wallace that the recently-enacted $250 limitation on gifts to legislators contains certain exemptions, included in which is a personalized plaque or trophy not exceeding $250 in value. This has raised two questions in my mind on which I would appreciate an opinion. These are:

(1) In calculating the value of such a personalized plaque or trophy, is the value calculated before or after sales tax?

(2) In calculating the value of non-exempt gifts, is the value calculated before or after sales tax?

Thank you in advance for your response.

Sincerely yours,

Conni Barker
Director of Government Relations
